S.FORM: hawqan abaw 秋天 zik tmsuqan 'bagan lga.yasa qu kklhan trakis la.
S.PHON: ħawqan aβaw ** zik tms~ɕuqan ʔβaɣan lɣa.jas~ɕa qu kklħan trakis~ɕ la.
